parsed_review.summary: CP00-850 is a descriptor-only RP28 Marketplace permission/audit-binding + synthetic-fixture pack (RP28.P02.M04.S19-RP28.P02.M06.S14, 40 units, risk B). Read-only inspection (Read/Grep/Glob) confirms the pack-level production_ready claim is supported and correctly scoped as descriptor-only. Manifest holds production_ready=false and runtime_ready=false (descriptor layer), with production_ready_flag=marketplace_permission_audit_fixture_descriptor_verified pending this review. Implementation is consistent: registry.js adds MARKETPLACE_CP850_PACK_BINDING/REQUIREMENTS plus case-set/Hermes/Claude/handoff/descriptor builders, and createMarketplaceCp850PermissionAuditFixtureDescriptor chains from CP849 (source_descriptor=MarketplaceCp849SubmissionReviewWorkflowDescriptor). validators.js (validateMarketplaceCp850...) enforces descriptor_only=true, runtime_execution=false, no connector secret/OAuth/prompt/completion, no real data/permission detail/audit body, and rejects any app_submission/permission_review/tenant_install/install_receipt/connector_runtime/custom_ai runtime or permission/audit/product-state write across all 40 rows; deepFreeze enforces immutability. Tests (model.test.js) assert CP850 binding (first RP28.P02.M04.S19, last RP28.P02.M06.S14, 40 units), coverage with errors [] and matching deliverable/micro distributions, runtime-closure (app_submission_executed/permission_decision_written/audit_event_written false, case-set row_count 40), and contract projection (latest_pack CP00-850, projections.cp850 descriptor, validation.latest_pack_id CP00-850). Contract (18,766 lines) scanned: validation.valid=true, latest_pack_id=CP00-850, no_write_attestation all false, and zero *_executed/*_written/writes_product_state/real_client_data/credential true flags; no writeFile/fetch/exec/spawn in the marketplace package or validate-rp28 script. Plan alignment verified: plan packs[0] CP00-850 matches the manifest plan_binding_snapshot exactly (deviation_from_plan=false), live next is CP00-851 at RP28.P02.M06.S15, and deliverable_distribution {test:8,contract:2,implementation:17,security_audit:4,ui:5,claude_review:2,failure_recovery:2} plus micro_title {Secondary Workflow Slice:4, Permission And Audit Binding:22, Synthetic Fixture Set:14} match the baseline (40 units). Authority boundary correct: Claude is read-only independent reviewer (not final approver), claude_is_final_approval/promotes_claude_to_final_approval false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening true, and Hermes packets emit_runtime_receipt=false / hermes_runtime_embedded_in_product=false (deterministic review/receipt handling only, not embedded product runtime). Review-hardening checks pass: no prior invalid review attempts to reject; readiness auth preflight passed (exit 0, 1455 stdout bytes); the claude-review-result stdout_bytes=0/pending_review is the honest pre-review placeholder (valid_review_receipts empty), not a failed/auth/malformed attempt; unrelated dirty files (progress-control-room data/html, docs/ldip-integration invalid-attempt, workbook/*, the .docx spec) are correctly excluded (active_untracked_implementation_files_omitted=[]). One informational P3: command-evidence.json captures only the two marketplace-scoped commands while the full 10-command closeout suite remains a downstream gate per construction-inspection.json (by-design sequencing). Verdict PASS_WITH_FINDINGS with no P0/P1/P2; does not block pack or goal closeout. Final production_ready promotion still requires this valid receipt plus the full validation suite, and human final approval for any enterprise-trust/runtime claim remains external to this receipt and is not claimed by this pack.

findings.title: Full closeout validation suite still pending; command-evidence captures only marketplace-scoped commands
findings.details: command-evidence.json records only two commands as passed: `npm run rp28:marketplace:validate` (exit 0) and `node --test packages/marketplace/test/*.test.js` (exit 0), with status=pending_full_validation and gate_outcome=pending_valid_review_and_full_validation. The 10-command closeout validation suite expected before closeout (closeout-pack-plan:validate, closeout-pack:validate, npm test, validate, spec:requirements:validate, weighted:validate, fullplan:validate, goal:closeout:validate, rp00:control-plane:validate, git diff --check) is not yet captured. This is consistent with the pack's own gating: construction-inspection.json and manifest state CP00-850 stays in_progress and not production_ready until exactly one valid hardened read-only Claude review receipt AND the full validation suite pass. Manifest correctly holds production_ready=false and runtime_ready=false, so there is no over-claim. This is expected pre-review sequencing (review -> full validation -> promote+commit), not a defect in the descriptor implementation, and matches the pattern accepted for CP00-845 through CP00-849.
findings.recommendation: Before flipping production_ready and committing, run and capture the full 10-command validation suite alongside this review receipt, as required by construction-inspection.json. No code change required; this is a closeout-automation sequencing checkpoint.
findings.post_review_disposition: Informational / non-blocking. By-design gating enforced by closeout automation; tracked so the full validation suite is run before production_ready promotion. Does not block this review, the pack closeout, or goal closeout.
